      - name: Upload OWASP Dependency Check results
        
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@master
        with:
          name: OWASP Dependency Check Report
          path: ${{github.workspace}}/reports
      - name: Add coverage report to PR
        uses: madrapps/jacoco-report@v1.6.1
        
        with:
          paths: ${{github.workspace}}/storefront-bff/target/site/jacoco/jacoco.xml
          token: ${{secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN}}
          min-coverage-overall: 80
          min-coverage-changed-files: 60
          title: 'Storefront BFF Coverage Report'
          update-comment: false
      - name: Log in to the Container registry
        if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      - name: Build and push Docker images
        if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
        with:
          context: ./storefront-bff
          push: true
          tags: ghcr.io/nashtech-garage/yas-storefront-bff:latest

======location-ci.yaml content ======:
name: location service ci

on:
  push:
    branches: ["**"]
    paths:
      - "location/**"
      - ".github/workflows/actions/action.yaml"
      - ".github/workflows/location-ci.yaml"
      - "pom.xml"
  pull_request:
    branches: ["main"]
    paths:
      - "location/**"
      - ".github/workflows/actions/action.yaml"
      - ".github/workflows/location-ci.yaml"
      - "pom.xml"
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  Build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      FROM_ORIGINAL_REPOSITORY: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name == github.repository || github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0 # Shallow clones should be disabled for a better relevancy of analysis
      - uses: ./.github/workflows/actions
      - name: Detect Service Name
        run: |
          FILE="${GITHUB_WORKFLOW_REF##*/}"
          FILE="${FILE%@*}"              # sampledata-ci.yaml
          SERVICE="${FILE%-ci.yaml}"    # sampledata

          echo "SERVICE_NAME=$SERVICE" >> $GITHUB_ENV
      - name: Run Maven Build Command
        run: mvn clean install -pl location -am
      - name: Run Maven Checkstyle
        
        run: mvn checkstyle:checkstyle -pl location -am -Dcheckstyle.output.file=location-checkstyle-result.xml
      - name: Upload Checkstyle Result
        uses: jwgmeligmeyling/checkstyle-github-action@master
        with:
          path: '**/location-checkstyle-result.xml'
      - name: Test Results
        uses: dorny/test-reporter@v1
        with:
          name: Location-Service-Unit-Test-Results
          path: "location/**/*-reports/TEST*.xml"
          reporter: java-junit
      - name: Analyze with sonar cloud
        id: sonar
        
        continue-on-error: true
        env:
          SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
        run: >
          mvn org.sonarsource.scanner.maven:sonar-maven-plugin:sonar
          -pl location -am -f pom.xml
          -Dsonar.coverage.jacoco.xmlReportPaths=location/target/site/jacoco/jacoco.xml
      - name: SonarCloud Summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          if [ "${{ steps.sonar.outcome }}" = "success" ]; then
            ICON="🟢"
            STATUS="PASS"
          else
            ICON="🔴"
            STATUS="FAIL"
          fi

          {
            echo "## SonarCloud Report"
            echo ""
            echo "| Item | Value |"
            echo "|------|-------|"
            echo "| Status | $ICON **$STATUS** |"
            echo "| Raw Outcome | \`${{ steps.sonar.outcome }}\` |"
            echo "| Final Conclusion | \`${{ steps.sonar.conclusion }}\` |"
            echo "| Service | \`${SERVICE_NAME}\` |"
            echo "| Branch | \`${{ github.ref_name }}\` |"
            echo "| Commit | \`${{ github.sha }}\` |"
            echo "| Actor | \`${{ github.actor }}\` |"
            echo ""
            echo "### Dashboard"
            echo "https://sonarcloud.io/dashboard?id=<YOUR_PROJECT_KEY>"
            echo ""
            echo "### Notes"
            echo "- If status = FAIL, open Sonar step logs."
            echo "- Check Quality Gate, coverage, bugs, vulnerabilities."
            echo "- If using continue-on-error, workflow still continues."
          } >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
      - name: OWASP Dependency Check
        
        uses: dependency-check/Dependency-Check_Action@main
        env:
          JAVA_HOME: /opt/jdk
        with:
          project: 'yas'
          path: '.'
          format: 'HTML'
      - name: Upload OWASP Dependency Check results
        
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@master
        with:
          name: OWASP Dependency Check Report
          path: ${{github.workspace}}/reports
      - name: Add coverage report to PR
        uses: madrapps/jacoco-report@v1.6.1
        
        with:
          paths: ${{github.workspace}}/location/target/site/jacoco/jacoco.xml
          token: ${{secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN}}
          min-coverage-overall: 80
          min-coverage-changed-files: 60
          title: 'Location Coverage Report'
          update-comment: false
      - name: Log in to the Container registry
        if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      - name: Build and push Docker images
        if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
        with:
          context: ./location
          push: true
          tags: ghcr.io/nashtech-garage/yas-location:latest

======backoffice-bff-ci.yaml content ======:
name: backoffice-bff service ci

on:
  push:
    branches: [ "**" ]
    paths:
      - "backoffice-bff/**"
      - ".github/workflows/actions/action.yaml"
      - ".github/workflows/backoffice-bff-ci.yaml"
      - "pom.xml"
  pull_request:
    branches: [ "main" ]
    paths:
      - "backoffice-bff/**"
      - ".github/workflows/actions/action.yaml"
      - ".github/workflows/backoffice-bff-ci.yaml"
      - "pom.xml"
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  Build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      FROM_ORIGINAL_REPOSITORY: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name == github.repository || github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0  # Shallow clones should be disabled for a better relevancy of analysis
      - uses: ./.github/workflows/actions
      - name: Detect Service Name
        run: |
          FILE="${GITHUB_WORKFLOW_REF##*/}"
          FILE="${FILE%@*}"              # sampledata-ci.yaml
          SERVICE="${FILE%-ci.yaml}"    # sampledata

          echo "SERVICE_NAME=$SERVICE" >> $GITHUB_ENV
      - name: Run Maven Build Command
        run: mvn clean install -DskipTests -f backoffice-bff
      - name: Run Maven Test
        run: mvn test -f backoffice-bff
      - name: Unit Test Results
        uses: dorny/test-reporter@v1
        with:
          name: Unit-Test-Results
          path: "backoffice-bff/**/surefire-reports/*.xml"
          reporter: java-junit
      - name: Analyze with sonar cloud
        id: sonar
        continue-on-error: true
        env:
          SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
        run: >
          mvn org.sonarsource.scanner.maven:sonar-maven-plugin:sonar
          -pl backoffice-bff -am -f pom.xml
          -Dsonar.coverage.jacoco.xmlReportPaths=backoffice-bff/target/site/jacoco/jacoco.xml
      - name: SonarCloud Summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          if [ "${{ steps.sonar.outcome }}" = "success" ]; then
            ICON="🟢"
            STATUS="PASS"
          else
            ICON="🔴"
            STATUS="FAIL"
          fi

          {
            echo "## SonarCloud Report"
            echo ""
            echo "| Item | Value |"
            echo "|------|-------|"
            echo "| Status | $ICON **$STATUS** |"
            echo "| Raw Outcome | \`${{ steps.sonar.outcome }}\` |"
            echo "| Final Conclusion | \`${{ steps.sonar.conclusion }}\` |"
            echo "| Service | \`${SERVICE_NAME}\` |"
            echo "| Branch | \`${{ github.ref_name }}\` |"
            echo "| Commit | \`${{ github.sha }}\` |"
            echo "| Actor | \`${{ github.actor }}\` |"
            echo ""
            echo "### Dashboard"
            echo "https://sonarcloud.io/dashboard?id=<YOUR_PROJECT_KEY>"
            echo ""
            echo "### Notes"
            echo "- If status = FAIL, open Sonar step logs."
            echo "- Check Quality Gate, coverage, bugs, vulnerabilities."
            echo "- If using continue-on-error, workflow still continues."
          } >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
      - name: Log in to the Container registry
        if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      - name: Build and push Docker images
        if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
        with:
          context: ./backoffice-bff
          push: true
          tags: ghcr.io/nashtech-garage/yas-backoffice-bff:latest


======rating-ci.yaml content ======:
name: rating service ci

on:
  push:
    branches: ["**"]
    paths:
      - "rating/**"
      - ".github/workflows/actions/action.yaml"
      - ".github/workflows/rating-ci.yaml"
      - "pom.xml"
  pull_request:
    branches: ["main"]
    paths:
      - "rating/**"
      - ".github/workflows/actions/action.yaml"
      - ".github/workflows/rating-ci.yaml"
      - "pom.xml"
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  Build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      FROM_ORIGINAL_REPOSITORY: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name == github.repository || github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0 # Shallow clones should be disabled for a better relevancy of analysis
      - uses: ./.github/workflows/actions
      - name: Detect Service Name
        run: |
          FILE="${GITHUB_WORKFLOW_REF##*/}"
          FILE="${FILE%@*}"              # sampledata-ci.yaml
          SERVICE="${FILE%-ci.yaml}"    # sampledata

          echo "SERVICE_NAME=$SERVICE" >> $GITHUB_ENV
      - name: Run Maven Build Command
        run: mvn clean install -pl rating -am
      - name: Run Maven Checkstyle
        
        run: mvn checkstyle:checkstyle -pl rating -am -Dcheckstyle.output.file=rating-checkstyle-result.xml
      - name: Upload Checkstyle Result
        
        uses: jwgmeligmeyling/checkstyle-github-action@master
        with:
          path: '**/rating-checkstyle-result.xml'
      - name: Test Results
        uses: dorny/test-reporter@v1
        with:
          name: Rating-Service-Unit-Test-Results
          path: "rating/**/*-reports/TEST*.xml"
          reporter: java-junit
      - name: Analyze with sonar cloud
        id: sonar
        
        continue-on-error: true
        env:
          SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
        run: >
          mvn org.sonarsource.scanner.maven:sonar-maven-plugin:sonar
          -pl rating -am -f pom.xml
          -Dsonar.coverage.jacoco.xmlReportPaths=rating/target/site/jacoco/jacoco.xml
      - name: SonarCloud Summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          if [ "${{ steps.sonar.outcome }}" = "success" ]; then
            ICON="🟢"
            STATUS="PASS"
          else
            ICON="🔴"
            STATUS="FAIL"
          fi

          {
            echo "## SonarCloud Report"
            echo ""
            echo "| Item | Value |"
            echo "|------|-------|"
            echo "| Status | $ICON **$STATUS** |"
            echo "| Raw Outcome | \`${{ steps.sonar.outcome }}\` |"
            echo "| Final Conclusion | \`${{ steps.sonar.conclusion }}\` |"
            echo "| Service | \`${SERVICE_NAME}\` |"
            echo "| Branch | \`${{ github.ref_name }}\` |"
            echo "| Commit | \`${{ github.sha }}\` |"
            echo "| Actor | \`${{ github.actor }}\` |"
            echo ""
            echo "### Dashboard"
            echo "https://sonarcloud.io/dashboard?id=<YOUR_PROJECT_KEY>"
            echo ""
            echo "### Notes"
            echo "- If status = FAIL, open Sonar step logs."
            echo "- Check Quality Gate, coverage, bugs, vulnerabilities."
            echo "- If using continue-on-error, workflow still continues."
          } >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
      - name: OWASP Dependency Check
        
        uses: dependency-check/Dependency-Check_Action@main
        env:
          JAVA_HOME: /opt/jdk
        with:
          project: 'yas'
          path: '.'
          format: 'HTML'
      - name: Upload OWASP Dependency Check results
        
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@master
        with:
          name: OWASP Dependency Check Report
          path: ${{github.workspace}}/reports
      - name: Add coverage report to PR
        uses: madrapps/jacoco-report@v1.6.1
        
        with:
          paths: ${{github.workspace}}/rating/target/site/jacoco/jacoco.xml
          token: ${{secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN}}
          min-coverage-overall: 80
          min-coverage-changed-files: 60
          title: 'Rating Coverage Report'
          update-comment: false
      - name: Log in to the Container registry
        if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      - name: Build and push Docker images
        if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
        with:
          context: ./rating
          push: true
          tags: ghcr.io/nashtech-garage/yas-rating:latest

======storefront-ci.yaml content ======:
name: storefront service ci

on:
  push:
    branches: [ "main" ]
    paths:
      - "storefront/**"
      - ".github/workflows/actions/action.yaml"
      - ".github/workflows/storefront-ci.yaml"
  pull_request:
    branches: [ "main" ]
    paths:
      - "storefront/**"
      - ".github/workflows/actions/action.yaml"
      - ".github/workflows/storefront-ci.yaml"
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  Build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      FROM_ORIGINAL_REPOSITORY: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name == github.repository || github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0  # Shallow clones should be disabled for a better relevancy of analysis
      - uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: 20
      - run: npm ci
        working-directory: storefront
      - run: npm run build
        working-directory: storefront
      - run: npm run lint
        working-directory: storefront
      - run: npx prettier --check .
        working-directory: storefront
      - name: SonarCloud Scan
        uses: SonarSource/sonarcloud-github-action@v5
        with:
          projectBaseDir: storefront
        env:
          GITHUB_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}  # Needed to get PR information, if any
          SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
      - name: SonarCloud Summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          if [ "${{ steps.sonar.outcome }}" = "success" ]; then
            ICON="🟢"
            STATUS="PASS"
          else
            ICON="🔴"
            STATUS="FAIL"
          fi

          {
            echo "## SonarCloud Report"
            echo ""
            echo "| Item | Value |"
            echo "|------|-------|"
            echo "| Status | $ICON **$STATUS** |"
            echo "| Raw Outcome | \`${{ steps.sonar.outcome }}\` |"
            echo "| Final Conclusion | \`${{ steps.sonar.conclusion }}\` |"
            echo "| Service | \`${SERVICE_NAME}\` |"
            echo "| Branch | \`${{ github.ref_name }}\` |"
            echo "| Commit | \`${{ github.sha }}\` |"
            echo "| Actor | \`${{ github.actor }}\` |"
            echo ""
            echo "### Dashboard"
            echo "https://sonarcloud.io/dashboard?id=<YOUR_PROJECT_KEY>"
            echo ""
            echo "### Notes"
            echo "- If status = FAIL, open Sonar step logs."
            echo "- Check Quality Gate, coverage, bugs, vulnerabilities."
            echo "- If using continue-on-error, workflow still continues."
          } >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
      - name: Log in to the Container registry
        if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      - name: Build and push Docker images
        if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
        with:
          context: ./storefront
          push: true
          tags: ghcr.io/nashtech-garage/yas-storefront:latest

======pricing-ci.yaml content ======:
name: pricing service ci

on:
  push:
    branches: [ "**" ]
    paths:
      - "pricing/**"
      - ".github/workflows/actions/action.yaml"
      - ".github/workflows/pricing-ci.yaml"
      - "pom.xml"
  pull_request:
    branches: [ "main" ]
    paths:
      - "pricing/**"
      - ".github/workflows/actions/action.yaml"
      - ".github/workflows/pricing-ci.yaml"
      - "pom.xml"
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  Build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      FROM_ORIGINAL_REPOSITORY: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name == github.repository || github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0  # Shallow clones should be disabled for a better relevancy of analysis
      - uses: ./.github/workflows/actions
      - name: Detect Service Name
        run: |
          FILE="${GITHUB_WORKFLOW_REF##*/}"
          FILE="${FILE%@*}"              # sampledata-ci.yaml
          SERVICE="${FILE%-ci.yaml}"    # sampledata

          echo "SERVICE_NAME=$SERVICE" >> $GITHUB_ENV
      - name: Run Maven Build Command
        run: mvn clean install -DskipTests -f pricing
      - name: Run Maven Test
        run: mvn test -f pricing
      - name: Unit Test Results
        uses: dorny/test-reporter@v1
        with:
          name: Unit-Test-Results
          path: "pricing/**/surefire-reports/*.xml"
          reporter: java-junit
      - name: Analyze with sonar cloud
        id: sonar
        
        continue-on-error: true
        env:
          SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
        run: >
          mvn org.sonarsource.scanner.maven:sonar-maven-plugin:sonar
          -pl pricing -am -f pom.xml
          -Dsonar.coverage.jacoco.xmlReportPaths=pricing/target/site/jacoco/jacoco.xml
      - name: SonarCloud Summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          if [ "${{ steps.sonar.outcome }}" = "success" ]; then
            ICON="🟢"
            STATUS="PASS"
          else
            ICON="🔴"
            STATUS="FAIL"
          fi

          {
            echo "## SonarCloud Report"
            echo ""
            echo "| Item | Value |"
            echo "|------|-------|"
            echo "| Status | $ICON **$STATUS** |"
            echo "| Raw Outcome | \`${{ steps.sonar.outcome }}\` |"
            echo "| Final Conclusion | \`${{ steps.sonar.conclusion }}\` |"
            echo "| Service | \`${SERVICE_NAME}\` |"
            echo "| Branch | \`${{ github.ref_name }}\` |"
            echo "| Commit | \`${{ github.sha }}\` |"
            echo "| Actor | \`${{ github.actor }}\` |"
            echo ""
            echo "### Dashboard"
            echo "https://sonarcloud.io/dashboard?id=<YOUR_PROJECT_KEY>"
            echo ""
            echo "### Notes"
            echo "- If status = FAIL, open Sonar step logs."
            echo "- Check Quality Gate, coverage, bugs, vulnerabilities."
            echo "- If using continue-on-error, workflow still continues."
          } >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
      - name: Log in to the Container registry
        if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      - name: Build and push Docker images
        if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
        with:
          context: ./pricing
          push: true
          tags: ghcr.io/nashtech-garage/yas-pricing:latest


======product-ci.yaml content ======:
name: product service ci

on:
  push:
    branches: [ "**" ]
    paths:
      - "product/**"
      - ".github/workflows/actions/action.yaml"
      - ".github/workflows/product-ci.yaml"
      - "pom.xml"
  pull_request:
    branches: [ "main" ]
    paths:
      - "product/**"
      - ".github/workflows/actions/action.yaml"
      - ".github/workflows/product-ci.yaml"
      - "pom.xml"
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  Build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    env:
      FROM_ORIGINAL_REPOSITORY: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.repo.full_name == github.repository || github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          fetch-depth: 0  # Shallow clones should be disabled for a better relevancy of analysis
      - uses: ./.github/workflows/actions
      - name: Detect Service Name
        run: |
          FILE="${GITHUB_WORKFLOW_REF##*/}"
          FILE="${FILE%@*}"              # sampledata-ci.yaml
          SERVICE="${FILE%-ci.yaml}"    # sampledata

          echo "SERVICE_NAME=$SERVICE" >> $GITHUB_ENV
      - name: Run Maven Build Command
        run: mvn clean install -DskipTests -pl product -am -f pom.xml
      - name: Run Maven Verify
        run: mvn verify -pl product -am -f pom.xml
      - name: Unit Test Results
        uses: dorny/test-reporter@v1
        with:
          name: Unit-Test-Results
          path: "product/**/surefire-reports/*.xml"
          reporter: java-junit
      - name: Enforce coverage threshold (>=70%)
        run: |
          python3 - <<'PY'
          import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET
          from pathlib import Path
          report_path = Path("product/target/site/jacoco/jacoco.xml")
          if not report_path.exists():
              raise SystemExit("JaCoCo report not found at product/target/site/jacoco/jacoco.xml")
          root = ET.parse(report_path).getroot()
          line_counter = next((c for c in root.findall("counter") if c.attrib.get("type") == "LINE"), None)
          if line_counter is None:
              raise SystemExit("No LINE counter in JaCoCo report")
          missed = int(line_counter.attrib["missed"])
          covered = int(line_counter.attrib["covered"])
          total = missed + covered
          coverage = (covered / total * 100.0) if total else 0.0
          print(f"Line coverage: {covered}/{total} = {coverage:.2f}%")
          if coverage < 70.0:
              raise SystemExit(f"Coverage gate failed: {coverage:.2f}% < 70.00%")
          PY
      - name: Upload JaCoCo report artifacts
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        if: ${{ success() || failure() }}
        with:
          name: product-jacoco-report
          path: |
            product/target/site/jacoco/index.html
            product/target/site/jacoco/jacoco.xml
            product/target/site/jacoco/jacoco.csv
      - name: Analyze with sonar cloud
        id: sonar
        
        continue-on-error: true
        env:
          SONAR_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.SONAR_TOKEN }}
        run: >
          mvn org.sonarsource.scanner.maven:sonar-maven-plugin:sonar
          -pl product -am -f pom.xml
          -Dsonar.coverage.jacoco.xmlReportPaths=product/target/site/jacoco/jacoco.xml
      - name: SonarCloud Summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          if [ "${{ steps.sonar.outcome }}" = "success" ]; then
            ICON="🟢"
            STATUS="PASS"
          else
            ICON="🔴"
            STATUS="FAIL"
          fi

          {
            echo "## SonarCloud Report"
            echo ""
            echo "| Item | Value |"
            echo "|------|-------|"
            echo "| Status | $ICON **$STATUS** |"
            echo "| Raw Outcome | \`${{ steps.sonar.outcome }}\` |"
            echo "| Final Conclusion | \`${{ steps.sonar.conclusion }}\` |"
            echo "| Service | \`${SERVICE_NAME}\` |"
            echo "| Branch | \`${{ github.ref_name }}\` |"
            echo "| Commit | \`${{ github.sha }}\` |"
            echo "| Actor | \`${{ github.actor }}\` |"
            echo ""
            echo "### Dashboard"
            echo "https://sonarcloud.io/dashboard?id=<YOUR_PROJECT_KEY>"
            echo ""
            echo "### Notes"
            echo "- If status = FAIL, open Sonar step logs."
            echo "- Check Quality Gate, coverage, bugs, vulnerabilities."
            echo "- If using continue-on-error, workflow still continues."
          } >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
      - name: Log in to the Container registry
        if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
        uses: docker/login-action@v3
        with:
          registry: ghcr.io
          username: ${{ github.actor }}
          password: ${{ secrets.GITHUB_TOKEN }}
      - name: Build and push Docker images
        if: ${{ github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' }}
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v6
        with:
          context: ./product
          push: true
          tags: ghcr.io/nashtech-garage/yas-product:latest


======actions/action.yaml content ======:
runs:
  using: "composite"
  steps:
    - name: Set up JDK 25
      uses: actions/setup-java@v4
      with:
        java-version: '25'
        distribution: 'temurin'
        cache: 'maven'
    - name: Cache SonarCloud packages
      uses: actions/cache@v4
      with:
        path: ~/.sonar/cache
        key: ${{ runner.os }}-sonar
        restore-keys: ${{ runner.os }}-sonar
